allow: Bash(HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 git commit -m "细化 VPN 教程全部操作步骤到点击级精度")

hooks.command: export HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 && cd /c/Users/HP/Desktop/1 && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "autosave $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" --allow-empty-message 2>/dev/null && git push 2>/dev/null) || true
